name: Asus VG279QM (IPS Panel, Res: 1920X1080, 280Hz, 1ms GTG, G-Sync )
highlights: TUF GAMING VG279QM is a 27-inch Full HD gaming monitor featuring a blazing-fast 280Hz refresh rate, 1ms response time, and ELMB Sync technology for ultra-smooth visuals

With a Fast IPS panel, HDR10 support, Adaptive-Sync, and a peak brightness of 400 nits, this monitor delivers exceptional clarity, vibrant colors (99% sRGB), and next-level responsiveness—perfect for competitive gamers
